data.name: bunifuLabel2.BaseStylesheet
data.value: #bunifu-label { padding: 0px; font-family: 'Arial'; font-size: 9.75pt; width: 100%; height: 100%; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(114, 114, 114); text-align: left; }
